# visaworker.ai

> Turn your career into a filing-ready O-1A, EB-1A, or NIW petition — drafted with the rigor of a top immigration firm, in days instead of months. Flat $249 per case.

## Pages

- [Home](/): O-1A, EB-1A & NIW petitions drafted in days, not months.
- [For immigration lawyers](/for-lawyers): A subscription workspace for firms to draft petitions faster.
- [Live demo](/demo): Open the real workspace on a seeded EB-1A petition for Elon Musk.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): How visaworker.ai collects, uses, and protects your data.
- [Terms of Service](/terms): Terms governing use of the service.

## Optional

- [Shared letter view](/letter/$token): Read-only public view of a generated letter.
